cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello Namrata ji, this is Rohan from Ashoka Tours & Travels. I hope you're doing well, sir. I'm calling to confirm the details of your holiday package to Goa that you booked with us yesterday.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, hello! Yes, I did book a package. What details do you need to confirm?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great, thank you for confirming! I just need to verify your flight timings. You've booked a flight from Delhi to Goa, departing at 10:30 AM, and returning at 5:00 PM, right, ji?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 36s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A legitimate travel agent from [TRAVEL_COMPANY] calls a customer to confirm the details of a holiday package to Goa that the customer had booked online a day earlier. The agent verifies the flight timings and hotel name.
